summary: Party Summary Dashboard Feature - ALL TESTS PASS (16/16 backend, 10/10 frontend features). Tested new Tally-style Party Summary subtab in Cash Book/Ledgers with summary cards, party table, filter, drill-down, PDF/Excel exports. Also verified filter reordering (Party Type before Select Party) and Shadcn Select styling.

1_party_summary_subtab_clickable.details: Party Summary subtab is clickable and shows party summary dashboard
1_party_summary_subtab_clickable.test_evidence: Playwright confirmed clicking cashbook-tab-party-summary switches view

2_summary_cards_display.details: Summary cards show: Total Parties (6), Settled (1), Pending (5), Outstanding (₹2,000)
2_summary_cards_display.test_evidence: Verified data-testid: party-summary-total=6, party-summary-settled=1, party-summary-pending=5, party-summary-outstanding=₹2,000

3_party_table_columns.details: Party table shows: Party Name, Party Type (badges), Jama, Nikasi, Balance (Dr/Cr), Txns, Status
3_party_table_columns.test_evidence: Table headers verified: ['#', 'Party Name', 'Party Type', 'Jama / Purchase (₹)', 'Nikasi / Payment (₹)', 'Balance (₹)', 'Txns', 'Status']

4_party_type_badges.details: Party Type displayed with colored badges (Agent, Local Party, Truck, Diesel)

5_party_type_filter_in_summary.details: Party Type filter in Party Summary filters the list
5_party_type_filter_in_summary.test_evidence: Filtering by 'Local Party' reduced from 6 to 3 parties, summary cards updated

6_party_row_drill_down.details: Clicking a party row switches to Transactions view and auto-filters by party name
6_party_row_drill_down.test_evidence: Clicked 'Badkutru (Full', switched to Transactions view with category filter set to 'Badkutru (Full'

7_party_summary_pdf_export.details: PDF export button works, returns valid PDF (verified PDF magic bytes)

8_party_summary_excel_export.details: Excel export button works, returns valid XLSX
8_party_summary_excel_export.test_evidence: API returns 200, content-type=spreadsheet, starts with PK (ZIP format)

9_filter_order_transactions_view.details: Filter order: Account → Type → Party Type → Select Party / पार्टी
9_filter_order_transactions_view.test_evidence: Playwright extracted filter labels: ['Account', 'Type', 'Party Type', 'Select Party / पार्टी']

10_shadcn_select_styling.details: Both Party Type and Select Party filters use Shadcn Select (not native select)
10_shadcn_select_styling.test_evidence: All filters verified as button with role=combobox (Shadcn Select pattern)

11_transactions_party_summary_toggle.details: Transactions and Party Summary tab toggle works correctly
11_transactions_party_summary_toggle.test_evidence: Switched between tabs multiple times, both render correctly

backend_api_tests.GET /api/cash-book/party-summary: 200 - Returns parties array and summary object

seed_data_creation: Created TEST_PartyA, TEST_PartyB (settled), TEST_PartyC transactions for testing, cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 37 - Party Summary Dashboard feature fully tested. Key features: 1) Party Summary subtab in Cash Book/Ledgers shows Tally-style summary, 2) Summary cards (Total/Settled/Pending/Outstanding), 3) Party table with badges and status, 4) Filter by Party Type, 5) Click drill-down to Transactions, 6) PDF/Excel export, 7) Filter reordering done, 8) All use Shadcn Select styling. 16 backend + 10 frontend tests all pass.
